highlights: Kim Yun-shin retrospective at Hoam Museum (March 17 - June 28).
Damien Hirst major survey at MMCA Seoul (March - June).
March Avery: Form into Color at Esther Schipper, Seoul (March 3 - April 25).
Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center exploring contemporary queer art.
Seo Seoul Museum of Art Inaugural Exhibitions: 'Breath' and 'Our Time Begins Here'.
10 Years anniversary exhibition at Perrotin Seoul (March 17 - May 2).
Park Chan-kyong: 'Zen Master Eyeball' at Kukje Gallery (March 19 - May 10).
Lee Wooseong solo exhibition at Gallery Hyundai.

stocks.market_sentiment: High volatility and cautious; global markets remain sensitive to geopolitical tensions.
